query:
ALTER TABLE projectPhases 
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS startMonth,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS delayMonths,
ADD COLUMN startDate VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-01' AFTER phaseName,
ADD COLUMN endDate VARCHAR(10) AFTER durationMonths;

DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS delayMonths,
ADD COLUMN startDate VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-01' AFTER phaseName,
